extortion.description: Talley Metal Fabrication, located in Southern California, specializes in high-quality structural steel, ornamental iron, electric gates, and custom metal fabrication. Since 1962, the company has been a leader in iron fabrication, providing premier craftsmanship and reliable results. Their offerings include customizable electric gates and a strong commitment to quality in ornamental iron products. Talley Metal Fabrication serves clients looking for high-quality metal solutions in various industries.
